title: Storage Drawers Unlimited Fixed
description: Fork of of original XaeronTheProtogen's Storage Drawers Unlimited
body:
# About
Storage Drawers Unlimited Fixed - fork of of original XaeronTheProtogen's [Storage Drawers Unlimited](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers-unlimited) with Ore Dictionary fix.
ModID doesn't changed, so no blocks should be removed while replacing original mod.

**Requires Storage Drawers** 

# Bugs
JEI doesn't show recipes with drawers from addon, but recipes are working.
